title: Rustic Venezuelan Banana Hash
description: A nutty and shaggy brunch dish featuring bananas, made with a mortar and pestle, suitable for a Buddhist temple gathering.
instructions: Pound the walnuts in a mortar and pestle until coarsely chopped.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the mashed bananas, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the mixture is lightly caramelized.
Stir in the vanilla extract and chopped walnuts.
Add the oat flour to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture is lightly toasted.
Serve the banana hash hot, garnished with additional chopped walnuts if desired.
